I'll help you list the IDs of all unresolved Sentry issues in the 'billing' project and count them. Let me write a program to retrieve this information

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def sentry-issues (sentry__list_issues {:project "billing" :status "unresolved"}))
(def unresolved-count (count sentry-issues))
(def unresolved-ids (map :id sentry-issues))
{:count unresolved-count :ids unresolved-ids}"}
